Package io.graphite.print.formatter

package io.graphite.print.formatter
Graph formatting and visualization.

This package contains formatter implementations that convert graphs into human-readable or exchange formats including compact adjacency lists, edge lists, matrices, JSON, Graphviz DOT, and Mermaid diagrams.

Applications typically access these formatters through GraphPrinter.

Since:
2.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.graphite.print
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CompactFormatter
    Formats a graph using Graphite's default compact representation.
    DotFormatter
    Formats a graph using the Graphviz DOT language.
    EdgeListFormatter
    Formats a graph as an edge list.
    JsonFormatter
    Formats a graph as a JSON document.
    MatrixFormatter
    Formats a graph as an adjacency matrix.
    MermaidFormatter
    Formats a graph using Mermaid diagram syntax.
    StatisticsFormatter
    Formats graph metadata and structural statistics.
    TreeFormatter
